data.title: Update test_ticket_reducer.py: add tests for reduce_all_tickets() .archived marker fast-skip and crash-injection fallback
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## What
Modify tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py to add two new tests asserting reduce_all_tickets() behavior with .archived markers. These tests must FAIL before the fast-skip implementation is added.

## Tests to add (both must be RED before T4 implementation)

1. test_reduce_all_tickets_skips_dir_with_archived_marker:
   Given: a temp tracker dir with one archived ticket (has an ARCHIVED event) AND a .archived marker file
   When: reduce_all_tickets(tracker_dir) is called
   Then: the ticket dir is NOT processed by reduce_ticket() — the ticket is absent from the returned results (i.e., excluded entirely)
   Note: This represents the exclude_archived=True fast path. Use exclude_archived=True in the call.

2. test_reduce_all_tickets_fallback_without_marker_correct_state:
   Given: a temp tracker dir with one archived ticket (has ARCHIVED event) but NO .archived marker file (simulates crash between event write and marker write)
   When: reduce_all_tickets(tracker_dir, exclude_archived=False) is called
   Then: reduce_ticket IS called; result contains the ticket with archived=True (correct state returned via slow path)
   This verifies SC 1 correctness fallback and the crash-injection scenario.

## Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py (MODIFY — add 2 tests)
- .test-index: add RED marker [test_reduce_all_tickets_skips_dir_with_archived_marker] for plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Both new test functions exist in test_ticket_reducer.py
  Verify: grep -c "def test_reduce_all_tickets_skips_dir_with_archived_marker\|def test_reduce_all_tickets_fallback_without_marker_correct_state" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] test_reduce_all_tickets_skips_dir_with_archived_marker FAILS before implementation (RED)
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py::test_reduce_all_tickets_skips_dir_with_archived_marker; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] RED marker added to .test-index
  Verify: grep -q "\[test_reduce_all_tickets_skips_dir_with_archived_marker\]" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] ruff lint passes on modified test file
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py
